convention.tips1: Location for storing [Sync & Backup] app data (such as logs and metadata).
convention.tips2: Once enabled, the administrator can view and manage other users' connections in the overview.
convention.tips3: Once enabled, the "Shared folder" of the sync feature will keep file history versions to ensure the security of synchronized data. Historical versions can be viewed in "File Version Explorer"
convention.tips4: After enabling, the system will automatically retain historical versions of files for personal folders/ shared folders associated with sync tasks to ensure the security of synchronized data. For more settings, you can go to 'File Version Explorer'.
convention.appDatabaseLocationP: Please select the app database location
convention.migrateTips: Please change the app database location before migration
convention.installErr1: Please install “File Version Explorer” in “App Center” first
convention.installErr2: Please enable “File Version Explorer” in “App Center” first

turnOffVersionControl.title: Disable Version Control
turnOffVersionControl.warnText1: 1. Once disabled, the system will not retain any past version of the file, and deleted files can not be restored.
turnOffVersionControl.warnText2: 2. The existing file history version will be deleted.
turnOffVersionControl.closeVerSaveTip: After disabling, the system will no longer automatically enable version retention for personal folders/shared folders associated with synchronization tasks. Files for which version retention is not enabled will not be recoverable in case of accidental deletion. Folders that have already had version retention enabled will continue to retain historical versions of files.

editFolder.title: Edit
editFolder.numberReservedVersionsP: Please select the number of retained versions
editFolder.reduceVersion: After the number of versions is reduced, the system will automatically delete additional versions
editFolder.deleteTitle: Do you want to disable “{0}” version control?
editFolder.deleteWarn1: 1.Once disabled, the system will not retain any past versions of the shared folder and files deleted accidentally will not be restored
editFolder.deleteWarn2: 2. Past versions of existing files will be deleted as well
editFolder.saveTips: The current settings have been changed. Do you want to save and exit?

unableAdd.title: Unable to Add
unableAdd.context: Version retention function is enabled for all shared folders
unableAdd.adminAddVerNoFitter: The current versions of “Sync & Backup” and “File Version Explorer” are incompatible. Please update “File Version Explorer”.
unableAdd.userAddVerNoFitter: The current versions of “Sync & Backup” and “File Version Explorer” are incompatible. To use this feature, please contact the administrator to update “File Version Explorer”.

settingNotApplied.title: Settings Not Applied
settingNotApplied.context: The current settings have changed. Do you want to save the changes?

speedLimit.tips: Once enabled, the speed of new connection is limited by default to control system resource usage
speedLimit.speedLimitErr1: Please enter an integer greater than 10

backup.validePasswordTitle: Please enter the password of account {name} to continue

toast.sameFolderName: A folder with the same name already exists

backup.backupPathRepeat: The current folder or its subfolder/parent folder is already used in another backup task. Please select again

createTaskEntry.mainText: Auto backup important data for security
createTaskEntry.subText: Support backup this computer, this UGREEN NAS, another UGREEN NAS, or other devices supporting Rsync service.

createTaskEntryModal.backupVersionLabelTips: Multi-version differential backup model will retain multiple backup versions. After enabling Version Retention Policy, the latest backup version will be retained based on the settings.

backupRestoreItem.title: Back up UGREEN NAS
backupRestoreItem.subTitle: Back up local data on remote server
backupRestoreItem.subTitle1: Back up local data on UGREEN NAS

createBackupTask.title: Create backup task
createBackupTask.incrementBackupTips: In single version, files created and modified on the source device will be copied to the backup destination, and files deleted from the source remain at the destination after backup
createBackupTask.mirrorBackupTips: For a single version, the backup destination will be the image copy of the source. If the destination has a file that does not exist at the source, the file will be deleted
createBackupTask.backupPolicyOption2Tips: Backup only when manually clicking "Back Up Now"
createBackupTask.backupPolicyOption3Tips: Backup automatically on a regular basis only according to the established backup plan
createBackupTask.step2Tips: Backup policy execution depends on the client. If you exit the client, backup stops
createBackupTask.deleteSynchronizationContext: Do you want to delete this backup task?
createBackupTask.backuoPcNas: Back up computer to UGREEN NAS
createBackupTask.folderNameErr: The folder name cannot contain any of the following characters: /:
createBackupTask.localFolderNoPermissionTips: Unable to backup read-only permission folders on the computer (including systen "programs" folders and so on), please check the permissions of the following paths and their subdirectories
createBackupTask.remoteFolderNoPermission: Permissions denied for the folder of the remote server. Please check and try again!
createBackupTask.backupExternalDeviceInsertedImmediately: Back up instantly when external device is connected

editBackupTask.title: Edit backup task
editBackupTask.switchBackupContext: Performing this operation will delete the locally deleted backup files from the computer in the backup destination
editBackupTask.context: A backup task is available on the current computer. Please view and edit it in the task list
editBackupTask.unableCreateRepeatTask: The current folder or its subfolder/parent folder is already used for another sync task. Please select again
editBackupTask.editTaskFailModalCont1: Invalid backup sources. Please cancel permission-denied folders and resubmit. Click "Confirm" to remove non-existent folders from the backup source.
editBackupTask.editTaskFailModalCont2: Invalid backup sources. Please cancel permission-denied folders and resubmit.
editBackupTask.editTaskFailModalCont3: Invalid backup sources. Click "Confirm" to remove non-existent folders from the backup source.
editBackupTask.editNASTaskFailModalCont: Invalid backup sources. Please check in “File Manager” if the folders are accessible. Click "Confirm" to remove them from backup source.
editBackupTask.editRsyncTaskFailModalCont: The following invalid backup sources have been detected. Please go to "Server" to check if the folders can be accessed normally. After clicking "OK," these folders will be removed from the backup sources.
editBackupTask.isAllPathsInvalid: Please select at least one valid folder

welcomeModal.title: Please create restore task
welcomeModal.emptyShareFolder: Please select the shared folder first
welcomeModal.emptyBackupTask: No Local UGREEN NAS backup task
welcomeModal.deepRestoreTips: *It may not be recognized if the file path is too deep. Please put the backup package in the shared folder within 3 levels of directory.
welcomeModal.backupListError: Failed to retrieve the backup package

backupLogModal.stopBackup: Stop backup (The number of failed files exceeds the limit)

taskSucModal.title: Successful
taskSucModal.content: You can view the restoration progress in the Task Center on the desktop

viewPackageFailModal.title: Unable to recognize the content of the backup package
viewPackageFailModal.content: The backup package format is incorrect. Please replace the backup package

networkErrorModal.title: Prompt
networkErrorModal.content1: Remote connection failed. Please check whether the connection is normal.
networkErrorModal.content2: The backup destination has no version file

restorePathModal.title: Choose restore path

backupRestore.checkDuplicatePaths: A backup or sync task with the same path already exists. Please modify the path on PC or the backup destination.

logindex.name: Name
logindex.clientVersionError: The client is not compatible with app version. Please update the client.

clearPane.clearTips: When the number of all user's transmission logs reaches any of the limits, excessive old logs will be cleared
clearPane.clearUserTLogs: Do you want to clear transmission logs of the current user? After clearing, they cannot be restored
clearPane.clearUserOLogs: Do you want to clear operation logs of the current user? After clearing, they cannot be restored
clearPane.clearAllUserTLogs: Do you want to clear transmission logs of all users? After clearing, they cannot be restored

synchronous.mainText: Easily achieve data sync between UGREEN NAS and other devices
synchronous.subText: Support sync between UGREEN NAS and the computer or another UGREEN NAS
synchronous.downLoadContext: To sync or back up files from the computer or mobile device to UGREEN NAS, please install the corresponding client, and create and manage tasks on it

createSynchronizationTask.title: Create Sync Task
createSynchronizationTask.bidirectionalSyncTips: File changes (addition, modification, deletion, move, etc.) on either the computer or NAS will be synced on the other.
createSynchronizationTask.downloadDataFromNas: Only sync data changes of UGREEN NAS to computer
createSynchronizationTask.downloadDataFromNasTips: The file will be deleted simultaneously from computer after deleting it from UGREEN NAS.
createSynchronizationTask.downloadDataFromNasTips2: Deleting files on the NAS won't affect files on the computer.
createSynchronizationTask.onlyUploadDataToNas: Only sync data changes of computer to UGREEN NAS
createSynchronizationTask.onlyUploadDataToNasTips: The file will be deleted simultaneously from UGREEN NAS after deleting it from computer.
createSynchronizationTask.onlyUploadDataToNasTips2: Deleting files on the computer won't affect files on the NAS
createSynchronizationTask.errTips: The directory selection is currently enabled. Please disable it before performing operations
createSynchronizationTask.deleteFile: Save files deleted by the remote server on UGREEN NAS
createSynchronizationTask.manualSynchronizationTips: Sync only when manually clicking "Sync Now"
createSynchronizationTask.synchronizeScheduledTips: Sync automatically on a regular basis only according to the established sync plan
createSynchronizationTask.step2Tips: Sync policy execution depends on the client. If you exit the client, sync stops
createSynchronizationTask.deleteSynchronizationContext: Do you want to delete this sync task?
createSynchronizationTask.chooseNasPathModalTitle: Select the UGREEN NAS folder that needs to be synchronized
createSynchronizationTask.remotePathRepeat: This remote folder is in use, please choose another one
createSynchronizationTask.localFolderCanNotUse: Folder permission denied, please select again
createSynchronizationTask.nasRecycleBinTips: NAS files deleted by a sync task will be moved to "NAS Recycle Bin" (#SyncVersion folder). You can view them in "More > NAS Recycle Bin" in task card. Clearing the NAS Recycle Bin will permanently delete these files
createSynchronizationTask.pcRecycleBinTips: Computer files deleted by a sync task will be moved to "Computer Recycle Bin" (#SyncVersion folder). You can view them in "More > Computer Recycle Bin" in task card. Clearing the Computer Recycle Bin will permanently delete these files
createSynchronizationTask.recycleBinIntervalTips: Automatically delete files older than {n} days

createSyncTaskNewModal.syncPcTips: Please download UGREEN NAS first

newPlan.title: Add a Plan
newPlan.tips: Sync policy execution depends on the client. If you exit the client, sync stops
newPlan.deleteContext: Do you want to delete this plan?
newPlan.syncFontPoint: Sync files and folders prefixed with "."

advancedSetting.title: Advanced Settings
advancedSetting.synchronizeFoldersTips: Please select the remote folder you want to sync
advancedSetting.fileFilterTips: Sync files and folders prefixed with "."
advancedSetting.filterExtensionNames: Filter the following file (folder) names or file extensions
advancedSetting.filterRulesP: Please enter the file/folder names or extensions, separated by ";"
advancedSetting.tips1: To filter the specified file name, please fill in the file name, such as abc.doc, test*.doc and tmp.*.
advancedSetting.tips2: To filter the specified file type, please fill in the extension name, such as *.jpg.
advancedSetting.tips3: To filter files and folders without extensions, enter the file/folder name, such as abc.
advancedSetting.renameConflictFiles: Keep new files and rename old files
advancedSetting.overwriteOldFiles: Replace old files with new files
advancedSetting.filterRules4Placeholder: Please enter the file/folder names or extensions, separated by ";"
advancedSetting.filterRulesTitleErr3: At least one filter setting item is required.

taskItem.fileSynchronizationFailed: Failed to sync {num} file(s) | Failed to sync {num} file(s)
taskItem.waitSynchronizationTips: Another sync task is currently occupying the computer path. Please wait patiently
taskItem.statusError: Insufficient volume capacity where the app is installed
taskItem.linkErrorContent: Sync & Backup is abnormal. Unable to perform sync and backup tasks with the computer, please restart the app or retry after logging out.
taskItem.relinkFail: Failed to enable service, please retry after logging out.

error.tooLong: The file path may be too long. You can shorten the file path and enable sync again
error.insufficient4Folder: Insufficient volume capacity: The hard disk volume capacity or the computer volume capacity of the UGREEN NAS is insufficient
error.configInfoMissing: Task configuration information lost, please delete and recreate it
error.occupied: The file is occupied by another program
error.accessIsDenied: The current file access is denied
error.insufficient4Basic: Insufficient computer storage space or NAS volume capacity
error.insufficient4Disk: The memory space of C drive (Win) or system drive (Mac) or NAS is insufficient, which affects the read and write of the sync service. Please clear or restart the device and try again
error.folderPathNotADirectory: The current file path is not a general folder. Please check
error.tryAgain: File not found. Please check and try again
error.folderPathMissing: Sync directory missing was detected. You can cancel the sync task and create again (the synced files are not affected)
error.fileChangedDuringHashing: The file was detected to change frequently and will be synced later
error.folderMarkerMissing: Task configuration file lost, please delete and recreate it
error.readDataError: Reading exception. Please check the file and try again
error.IllegalOpeError: During sync, the file was operated abnormally. You can cancel the sync task and create again (the synced files are not affected)
error.operationNotPermitted: This file is a restricted file
error.differsFromNameInFilesystem: A difference in the file name at both ends was detected. Please check (case differences will also be detected)
error.deleteIncludeIgnores: The folder you deleted contains filtered files. Please modify the file filtering policy or change it to a non-sync deletion policy
error.localFolderMissing: Permission denied or missing for the current directory
error.fileModified: File changed, please perform the task again
error.fileChangeAndRetry: File lost or changed, please perform the task again
error.directoryNotEmpty: Directory deletion failed. There are other files besides this sync task.

webHome.statusErrorTip: Failed to get status, please retry later.
webHome.delClientDes: If this connection is deleted, the sync and backup tasks of all users under this connection will be deleted.
webHome.backupNasToRemote: Back up UGREEN NAS to the remote server
webHome.backupRemoteToNas: Back up the remote server to UGREEN NAS
webHome.syncNasToRemote: Sync UGREEN NAS to the remote server
webHome.syncRemoteToNas: Sync the computer to UGREEN NAS
webHome.inputSaveNums: Please enter the number of retained versions
webHome.incrementDes: In single version, files created and modified on the source device will be copied to the backup destination, and files deleted from the source remain at the destination after backup
webHome.mirrorDes: For a single version, the backup destination will be the image copy of the source. If the destination has a file that does not exist at the source, the file will be deleted
webHome.versionDes: A new version folder will be created at the destination each time the backup is run
webHome.saveOldVer: The number of retained versions is exceeded. The earliest version will be replaced
webHome.inputVerNum: Please enter the number of versions
webHome.syncDest2Des: Sync only when manually clicking "Sync Now"
webHome.syncPlanDes: Sync automatically on a regular basis only according to the established sync plan
webHome.syncTips:
The sync policy execution depends on the sync target and the operation of UGREEN.
If either of them is interrupted, the sync will be interrupted
webHome.clientFailDes: Connection failed. Please check the server status or enter
webHome.fileFail: Failed to {type} {num} file(s) | Failed to {type} {num} file(s)
webHome.isFileNameClas: Keep new files and rename old files
webHome.limitFileSizeDes: Files will not be backed up
webHome.filterFileExtDes: Filter the following file names (folders) or file extensions
webHome.inputFileExt: Enter file/folder names or extensions, separated by ";"
webHome.inputFileExtDes1: To filter the specified file name, please fill in the file name, such as abc.doc, test*.doc and tmp.*.
webHome.inputFileExtDes2: To filter the specified file type, please fill in the extension name, such as *.jpg.
webHome.inputFileExtDes3: To filter files and folders without extensions, enter the file/folder name, such as abc
webHome.selectNeedSyncFolder: Please select the remote folder you want to sync
webHome.syncDotFileOrFolder: Sync files and folders prefixed with "."
webHome.nasTwoWaySyncTips: File changes (addition, modification, deletion, move, etc.) on either the remote or local path will be synced on the other.
webHome.onlyNasDownTips2: Deleting the remote files won’t affect the local files
webHome.onlyNasUpTips2: Deleting local files won't affect the remote files.
webHome.onlyNasDown: Only changes to the remote data will be synchronized to the local path
webHome.onlyNasDownTips: When a remote file is deleted, the corresponding local file will also be deleted
webHome.onlyNasUp: Only changes to the local data will be synchronized to the remote path
webHome.onlyNasUpTips: When a local file is deleted, the corresponding remote file will be deleted
webHome.inNasSaveDelFile: Save files deleted by the remote server on UGREEN NAS
webHome.newConnectTips:
· SSH connection must be enabled on the remote host
· The encrypted port must match the SSH port on the remote host
· This user account must be authorized to perform the sync task of SSH encryption
webHome.newSyncthingConnectTip: Please ensure that the "Sync & Backup" app is installed on the remote UGREEN NAS, Only UGREEN NAS devices with UGOS Pro are available currently
webHome.newRemoteRsyncServerConnectTip: Please ensure the device to connect has enabled corresponding file service. Path to enable remote UGREEN NAS rsync service: "Control Panel > File Service > Rsync"
webHome.inputSmbPortDes: By default, the SMB protocol uses ports 139 or 455. You can automatically detect available ports by entering them, or by entering the SMB service port of the file server you are connecting to
webHome.downloadText: Sync and backup files between UGREEN NAS and the computer
webHome.ipt1_65535: Please enter a number between 1 and 65535
webHome.reservePortsTip: This port is reserved by the system. Please use another one
webHome.localPathPremFail: Insufficient local folder permissions, please select the local folder again.
webHome.remotePathPremFail: Remote folder has insufficient permissions, please select the remote folder again.
webHome.remotePathRepeat: This remote folder has been used as a synchronization folder for another task, please select another folder.
webHome.ignoreFileFail: Ignore the Number of Failed Files
webHome.iptIgnoreFileNum: Please enter the number of failed files
webHome.iptIgnoreFileDes:
· When the number of failed files < the set number, the task status is Partial Synchronization Successful；
· When the number of failed files > the set number, the task automatically stops and issues a warning notification；
· Failed file details can be viewed in the synchronization log details.
webHome.switchPolyDes: Switching the sync strategy will empty the sync records and file transfer records of this task. Are you sure you want to switch the synchronization strategy?
webHome.lessOneFolder: Please select at least one folder
webHome.intervalGap: The interval ranges from 10 to 1,440 minutes
webHome.iptFullExt: Please enter the full file/file type format
webHome.taskWaitTips: Another sync task is currently occupying the local path. Please wait patiently
webHome.serClientFial: Request timeout, computer or device network exception
webHome.noRootPath: Do not select the root directory
webHome.downTips: To sync or back up files from the computer or mobile device to UGREEN NAS, please install the corresponding client, and create and manage tasks on it
webHome.checkShareFolderTip:
Locally match/create
shared folder name corresponding to the remote one
webHome.ipt1_9999999: Please enter a valid value from 1 to 9999999
webHome.sltWeek: Please select at least one item

webHome.backupRemoteToLocal: Back up remote data to local NAS
webHome.backupLocalToRemote: Back up local data to remote

webHome.createSyncTaskErr20112: Selected remote path does not exist

webHome.syncOncePlanDate: Start time cannot be earlier than the current time
webHome.createConnectionErr20108:
Please check:
1. Whether the server address/port of the server is correct
2. Whether the device has enabled {protocol} service
3. If connected by LAN IP, whether this UGREEN NAS and anther device are on the same LAN.
webHome.ugreenIpError:
Please check:
1. Whether the IP/Domain Name/UGREENlink ID/port of remote UGREEN NAS is correct.
2. Whether the Sync & Backup app has been installed on the remote NAS.
3. If connected by LAN IP, whether this UGREEN NAS and another NAS are on the same LAN.
webHome.updateRemoteNasVersion: Operation failed. Please update the remote NAS system version first.
webHome.notSupportTestTips: The trial account does not support this function
webHome.deviceAddressInvalidTip: Enter valid IP address/domain name/UGREENlink ID.
webHome.newRemoteServerConnectTip: Please ensure the device to connect has enabled corresponding file service. Path to enable remote UGREEN NAS service: "Control Panel > File Service"
webHome.newRemoteWebdavServerConnectTip: Please ensure the device to connect has enabled corresponding file service.  Path to enable remote UGREEN NAS WebDAV service: "Control Panel > File Service > WebDAV"
webHome.connectDeviceViaDomainNameTip: Port 22000 mapping is needed for connecting via domain name
webHome.plsAddStoragePool: The current device has only one storage pool. Please add a new storage pool.
webHome.backupSourceAndDestSame: The backup destination and backup source are in the same storage pool. Please choose a different backup destination.
webHome.noCanUsePool: No other available storage pools or folders
webHome.noCanUsePoolTips: For backup security, the destination and source must be in different storage pools
